description: hash_key sums the letter codes and wraps with % buckets, giving the same bucket for the same key every time.
put places the pair in the hashed bucket, chains on a collision, and updates an existing key instead of duplicating it.
get hashes the key, searches only that bucket, and returns the value or None.
Reuses hash_key inside put/get, copies the table instead of mutating, clear names.
